lines: The Chicago Cubs beat the New York Mets 10‑5 in yesterday’s doubleheader – a big win for the Cubs’ fans.
The Indiana Fever dropped a close game to the Phoenix Mercury, 111‑109, and will host the Los Angeles Sparks Saturday at 8 p.m. ET.
The Indianapolis Indians edged the Scranton/Wilkes‑Barre RailRiders 8‑6 and are playing again tonight at 7:05 p.m. ET.
The World Cup match between Turkey and the United States kicks off tonight at 10 p.m. ET, a rare chance to see the U.S. compete on home soil.
escape_hatch: you follow this way closer than I do.

speech: Here's the sports talk for Indianapolis, Thursday, June 25. The Chicago Cubs beat the New York Mets 10‑5 in yesterday’s doubleheader – a big win for the Cubs’ fans. The Indiana Fever dropped a close game to the Phoenix Mercury, 111‑109, and will host the Los Angeles Sparks Saturday at 8 p.m. ET. The Indianapolis Indians edged the Scranton/Wilkes‑Barre RailRiders 8‑6 and are playing again tonight at 7:05 p.m. ET. The World Cup match between Turkey and the United States kicks off tonight at 10 p.m. ET, a rare chance to see the U.S. compete on home soil. And if it gets away from you, your out is: you follow this way closer than I do.
